name: nifty-heatmap
description: A stunning, real-time Nifty 50 Index Heatmap with a premium liquid glass design.

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp index.html style.css script.js public/
scripts.sync: npx cap copy && npx cap sync
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap add android && npx cap copy && npx cap sync
